description: A passenger with an existing economy ticket wants to upgrade to an extra legroom seat.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's booking and view the seat map for their flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the booking and sees available extra legroom seats.

nodes.task_description: Inform the passenger of the cost to upgrade to a selected extra legroom seat.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct price for the seat upgrade.

nodes.task_description: Process the seat change and collect payment for the upgrade.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the passenger's seat assignment and issues a new boarding pass.
